nasb.text: The head is the elder and honorable man, And the prophet who teaches falsehood is the tail.

esv.text: the elder and honored man is the head, and the prophet who teaches lies is the tail;

cnv.text: 長老和尊貴人就是頭； 用謊言教導人的先知就是尾。

ccb.text: 头是指他们的长老和首领， 尾是指教人虚谎之事的假先知。

csbs.text: 长老和尊贵人就是头， 指教虚谎之事的先知就是尾。
